branding.title: Happenstance - Capital Region
branding.tagline: Plan your weekend with great food and events around Niskayuna, Albany & Saratoga

pairing_rules: Pair live music with vibrant, shareable plates.
Match family-friendly events with comforting classics.
Keep late-night shows close to late-night kitchens.
